recommendations.title: Toxic Love
recommendations.overview: The alienating and repetitive life of a group of heroin junkies in 1980s Rome.

recommendations.title: An Elephant Sitting Still
recommendations.overview: In the northern Chinese city of Manzhouli, they say there is an elephant that simply sits and ignores the world. Manzhouli becomes an obsession for the protagonists of this film, a longed-for escape from the downward spiral in which they find themsel

recommendations.title: Carne
recommendations.overview: After a dreadful incident coupled with an ungovernable paroxysm of violence, a butcher will fall into a downward spiral that will burn to the ground whatever dignity still remained in him.

recommendations.title: A Streetcar Named Desire
recommendations.overview: A disturbed, aging Southern belle moves in with her sister for solace — but being face-to-face with her brutish brother-in-law accelerates her downward spiral.

recommendations.title: The Hatchet Wielding Hitchhiker
recommendations.overview: After Kai saves a woman's life, he turns into an overnight hero and viral sensation — until disturbing truths about his erratic behavior come to light. This shocking documentary chronicles a happy-go-lucky nomad's ascent to viral stardom and the resu

recommendations.title: Guru
recommendations.overview: Matt, a charismatic coach, captivates crowds until he spirals into a disturbing downward spiral.

recommendations.title: Stander
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Andre Stander, a South African police officer turned bank robber.

recommendations.title: Team Foxcatcher
recommendations.overview: With never-before seen home video, this film recounts the paranoid downward spiral of John E. du Pont and the murder of Olympic wrestler Dave Schultz.

recommendations.title: A Star Is Born
recommendations.overview: A movie star helps a young singer-actress find fame, even as age and alcoholism send his own career into a downward spiral.

recommendations.title: Amy
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life of Amy Winehouse, the immensely talented yet doomed songstress. We see her from her teen years, where she already showed her singing abilities, to her finding success and then her downward spiral into alcoholism and drugs.
